2026-04-08T18:36:22.5419174Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-08T18:36:22.5421857Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-08T18:36:22.5422648Z 
2026-04-08T18:36:22.5423095Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-08T18:36:22.5425279Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T18:36:22.5425930Z 
2026-04-08T18:36:22.5426205Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T18:36:22.5426658Z

2026-04-08T18:36:22.5427315Z 
2026-04-08T18:36:22.5427545Z   git switch -
